notes: Search and products-by-category return results in data.products[] (up to 60 per page, page param 1-100). seller-feedback returns data.reviews[] (up to 25 per page, page param 1-100). product-details is a single object at data (no pagination). products-by-category works best with a query param; without one, eBay serves a JS-rendered browse page and may return 0-24 products. sort_by enums are UPPERCASE (BEST_MATCH, ENDING_SOONEST, NEWLY_LISTED, PRICE_LOWEST, PRICE_HIGHEST). domain defaults to com; supports 20 eBay marketplaces. aspects takes a JSON-encoded array of {name,value} objects (max 20). rapidapi_host is best-effort/unverified.
